_comment: Media files whose source is Figma (not the designers' repo — those are covered by scripts/sync-designer-media.sh). MCP asset URLs expire, so bytes are committed; to refresh, pull the node via the local figma-desktop MCP (get_design_context) and replace the file.

assets.source: Figma export or derived file — bytes committed; locate node via src/design-system/figma/nodes.ts if refresh needed
